methodsAttempted.query: site:uoanbar.edu.iq artificial intelligence policy University of Anbar AI policy OR guidance OR ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official University of Anbar Journal of Languages and Literature page titled Journal Policy on the Use of Artificial Intelligence.

Firecrawl search found the AUJLL policy page, an AJAS publication ethics page with AI language, an AJAS dedicated AI usage policy page linked from that ethics page, and several lower-specificity official pages such as workshops, staff profiles, PDFs, and article pages.
robots.txt allows User-agent * and disallows named AI training crawlers; no disallowed path was fetched for policy evidence.
robots.txt allows User-agent * and disallows /cache/ only; the policy page path was fetchable.
robots.txt allows User-agent * and disallows technical paths such as /class/, /data/, /lib/, /request/, /tmp/, /main/, /mainn/, /template/, and /view/; the AI policy page was fetchable.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found two usable journal-level AI policy pages under University of Anbar domains. No central university-wide AI policy was found in the official-domain search results, so claims are scoped only to the relevant journals.

stopConditions: Stop after verified official journal-level AI policies have been captured.
Do not infer University-wide policy from journal, event, staff, or article pages.
Do not crawl disallowed robots paths or login-gated resources.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Journal Policy on the Use of Artificial Intelligence
Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences - Artificial Intelligence (AI) Usage and Disclosure Policy

artifacts.claimText: The University of Anbar Journal of Languages and Literature permits reliable AI tools only for supportive purposes such as proofreading, formatting, and scientifically verifiable linguistic or textual analysis.

citation.citationTitle: Journal Policy on the Use of Artificial Intelligence
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The University of Anbar Journal of Languages and Literature requires authors to explicitly disclose AI-tool use in the Acknowledgment or Methodology section, including the tool, version, and purpose.

citation.citationTitle: Journal Policy on the Use of Artificial Intelligence
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences prohibits AI use for generating scientific content without human verification, fabricating or manipulating data, obscuring authorship responsibility, or listing AI tools as co-authors.

citation.citationTitle: Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences - Artificial Intelligence (AI) Usage and Disclosure Policy
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences requires manuscript AI-use disclosure at submission and bars reviewers from using AI tools to generate review reports while stating that editors must not rely on AI for editorial decisions.

citation.citationTitle: Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences - Artificial Intelligence (AI) Usage and Disclosure Policy

artifacts.sourceTitle: Journal Policy on the Use of Artificial Intelligence
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Researchers are permitted to use reliable AI tools for supportive purposes only, such as: Language proofreading and stylistic enhancement; Reference organization or text formatting; Analyzing linguistic or textual data in a scientifically verifiable and interpretable manner.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: AUJLL allows reliable AI tools only for supportive uses such as proofreading, formatting, and verifiable textual or linguistic analysis.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences - Artificial Intelligence (AI) Usage and Disclosure Policy
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The following uses are strictly prohibited: Generating scientific content (results, discussion, conclusions) without human verification; Fabrication or manipulation of data using AI; Use of AI in a way that obscures authorship responsibility; Listing AI tools as co-authors.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: AJAS prohibits AI-generated scientific content without human verification, AI data fabrication or manipulation, obscured authorship responsibility, and listing AI as co-author.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Anbar Journal of Agricultural Sciences - Artificial Intelligence (AI) Usage and Disclosure Policy
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Authors must disclose AI usage at submission. A statement must be included in the manuscript under a section titled: "AI Usage Disclosure" ... Reviewers: Must NOT use AI tools to generate review reports ... Editors: Must not rely on AI for editorial decisions.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: AJAS requires AI-use disclosure at submission, prohibits reviewers from using AI to generate reviews, and says editors must not rely on AI for editorial decisions.

artifacts.title: University of Anbar AI Policy Evidence Candidates
artifacts.summary: Official University of Anbar domain discovery found journal-level AI policy evidence for AUJLL and AJAS. The staged claims are scoped to those journals and do not assert a central University-wide AI policy.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central University of Anbar-wide AI policy was found in the official-domain searches performed in this run; current claims are limited to the cited journal pages.
